name: Reflex Plus Premium Adult Cat Food - Urinary Chicken 1.5kg
description: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Urinary Chicken is a premium cat food for all adult breeds with urinary concerns. Is your cat having trouble urinating or only passing a small amount of urine. This special formula has less magnesium and reduces urine pH to help prevent urinary tract crystals from blocking the urinary tract. Complete and balanced with chicken protein. Formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet your cats daily nutritional needs. Contact your veterinarian if the issue persists or worsens. Nature miraculously provided omega 3 & 6 balance using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia odour control, increases the absorption of nutrients. The immune system is strengthened, animals grow and performance improves. Good intestinal health and performance are achieved with pathogen-binding mannan oligosaccharide , immunogenic beta-glucans , and CitriStim , an immune-boosting yeast source. Brewer's yeast is used for healthy skin and shiny coat. Enriched with vitamins and minerals .   Ingredients: Corn, Rice, Chicken Fat, Psyllium Husk, Sugar Cane Fibre, Beet Pulp, Liver Flavour, Dl-methionine, Brewer's Yeast, Linseed, Xylo-oligosaccharides, Salt, L-Carnitine, Yucca Shidigera, Preservatives, Antioxidants. Minerals: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Iron, Selenium. Vitamins: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (Niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (Biotin) - B9 (Folic Acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantothene. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Raw Protein * ....................... 34% Crude Fat ?????........... 14% Crude Ash. ............................. 7% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ....... 4% FEEDING INGREDIENTS Vitamin A (E672) ........ 18,000 IU / kg Vitamin D3 (E671) ................................ 1,500 IU / kg Vitamin E (3a700) )...200 mg / kg Vitamin C (Stay C) ................................ 200 mg / kg Taurine 1,500 mg / kg   Feeding Suggestions The amount of food to be given per day may vary depending on the outdoor temperature, the living conditions (inside / outside the home), the character and activity of your cat. It is important to weigh the amount of food so that your cat can be an ideal weight. When adjusting the amount of food, it will be helpful to evaluate your cat's appetite, appearance and Oduor. Additional Tips Transition from one food to another must be made progressively by feeding small amounts of both foods for one week after mixing. Click here for instructions. Always keep clean and fresh water near the food bowl. Change it at least once a day. Store the product in a dry and cool place and be sure to close the packaging thoroughly after each use.
